## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes (CPU)
- [ ] `cargo test --features gpu` passes locally, if a GPU path changed
- [ ] Added/updated CPU-vs-GPU parity tests for any new GPU kernel
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` for user-visible changes
- [ ] Updated docs / README where relevant
